case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. TURNER CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANTS TURNER CONSTRUCTION AND SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKER INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
